message:
feat(analytics): integrate useWizardAnalytics into all wizard pages

- Add analytics tracking to reconnect-ubuntu (step 8)
- Add analytics tracking to status-check (step 9)
- Add analytics tracking to launch-onboarding (step 10)
- Fix ref update pattern in create-vps to use useEffect
- Remove unused imports (useCallback, ExternalLink)

The useWizardAnalytics hook is now properly integrated into all 10
wizard steps, enabling comprehensive funnel analytics including step
views, completion tracking, time spent, and abandonment detection.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
